channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] ADMINISTRATION → EUROPE : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ADMINISTRATION / EUROPE. Location: Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 5 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] TAIWAN → nan : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: TAIWAN / nan. Location: Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: BERLIN / nan. Location: Kyiv, Kyyiv, Misto, Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: NORWEGIAN / RUSSIA. Location: Norway. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: ODESSA / TEXAS. Location: Texas, United States. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 5 sources.
